is available from the CCW. The 
CCW updates the annual enrollment data files known as the MBSF using downloads from the CMS CME database. Each 
annual file includes all beneficiaries documented as being alive for some part of the calendar year and enrolled in the 
Medicare program (Part A or Part B) for at least one month of the year. 

CCW removes the Medicare beneficiary health insurance claim (HIC)27 numbers from all data files delivered to 
researchers. CCW adds a unique CCW beneficiary
